prompt: I just got a Framework Desktop with the AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 and 128GB of RAM running Ubuntu 24.04. I want to run Llama 3.1 70B on it with llama.cpp. How do I build it and what settings should I use for the best token generation speed? I've already installed ROCm 6.3.

assertions.name: ttm_memory_fix
assertions.description: Mentions TTM pages_limit configuration for Linux

assertions.name: correct_gpu_target
assertions.description: Specifies GPU_TARGETS=gfx1150 (or gfx1151) in the build command

assertions.name: full_gpu_offload
assertions.description: Uses -ngl 99 to offload all layers to GPU

assertions.name: quantization_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends an appropriate quantization (Q4_K_M or similar) for fitting 70B in 128GB
